response.step_by_step_log: The video is a static presentation showcasing fan messages, art, and concert information related to Hololive's 3rd generation members (Pekora, Flare, Noel, Marine). It uses a repeating, upbeat instrumental background track throughout, not a vocal song. I performed a search for the title mentioned in the text (which appeared to be a concert event title, not a song title). No vocal music was detected in the video, just ambient/background music.
response.global_summary: The video is a series of static slides displaying fan congratulations and information for a Hololive 3rd generation concert. There are no vocal songs performed in this video.

scenes.description: The video consists of various static image slides containing Japanese text, fan art, and information about a Hololive 3rd generation concert. Background music is purely instrumental throughout.
